description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Feature CI that runs on push and pull request events, excluding branches main and fix/* for push events. The workflow should have three jobs: linux, macos, and windows. The linux job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of gcc and clang images, the macos job runs on macos-11 with a matrix of Xcode versions, and the windows job runs on windows-2019. Each job should check out the code, create a build environment, configure, build, and test using cmake and related tools.
